name: curiosity.fixates.io
postCreateCommand: GCS_BUCKET='https://storage.googleapis.com/claude-code-dist-86c565f3-f756-42ad-8dfa-d59b1c096819/claude-code-releases' && VERSION=$(curl -fsSL $GCS_BUCKET/latest) && curl -fsSL -o /tmp/claude $GCS_BUCKET/$VERSION/linux-x64/claude && chmod +x /tmp/claude && mkdir -p ~/.local/bin && mv /tmp/claude ~/.local/bin/claude && echo 'export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"' >> ~/.bashrc && echo 'export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"' >> ~/.zshrc
postStartCommand: sudo chown vscode:vscode ~/.claude && cp ~/.claude-host-credentials.json ~/.claude/.credentials.json 2>/dev/null; cp ~/.claude-host-config.json ~/.claude.json 2>/dev/null; true
